fields.name: USB Rubber Ducky
fields.description: Classic HID injection tool. Executes keystroke payloads on any USB-enabled computer in seconds. Essential for physical penetration testing and security awareness demos.

fields.name: Bash Bunny
fields.description: Multi-function USB attack tool by Hak5. Supports HID injection, mass storage emulation, and network attacks. Runs payloads written in simple Bash scripts.

fields.name: Malduino
fields.description: Open-source BadUSB device based on Arduino. Programmable HID injector, ideal for learning keystroke injection in controlled lab environments.

fields.name: Digispark USB
fields.description: Tiny ATtiny85-based microcontroller board with USB. Can be programmed as a BadUSB device or general-purpose microcontroller for DIY projects.

fields.name: Keystroke Injector USB
fields.description: Standalone USB HID injector for executing pre-programmed keystroke sequences. Used for automated red team physical assessments.

fields.name: Alfa AWUS036ACH
fields.description: Dual-band AC1200 USB WiFi adapter with monitor mode and packet injection support. Compatible with Kali Linux out of the box. Industry standard for WiFi auditing.

fields.name: Alfa AWUS036NHA
fields.description: High-gain 802.11b/g/n USB adapter with Atheros AR9271 chipset. Excellent monitor mode support, widely used for WPA/WPA2 auditing.

fields.name: TP-Link TL-WN722N v1
fields.description: Budget-friendly 150Mbps USB adapter with Atheros AR9271 chipset supporting monitor mode. Best entry-level option for WiFi security learning.

fields.name: USB Data Blocker
fields.description: Blocks data pins on USB connections, allowing only charging. Protects against juice jacking attacks in public charging stations.

fields.name: Faraday Bag
fields.description: Signal-blocking pouch that isolates phones, key fobs, and cards from RFID/NFC/cellular/WiFi/GPS signals. Essential for investigators and privacy-conscious users.

fields.name: Faraday Box
fields.description: Rigid metal Faraday enclosure for laptops, tablets, and multiple devices. Blocks all wireless signals for secure evidence storage or covert device examination.

fields.name: Encrypted USB Drive
fields.description: Hardware-encrypted USB flash drive with AES-256 protection. PIN-based access, auto-wipe after failed attempts. No software required.

fields.name: Hardware Password Manager
fields.description: Offline hardware password manager. Stores and types credentials via USB HID without exposing them to the host OS or internet.

fields.name: Laptop Privacy Screen
fields.description: Anti-spy screen filter that limits viewing angles to 60 degrees. Prevents visual eavesdropping in public spaces. Available in 13", 14", 15.6" sizes.

fields.name: Webcam Cover Slider
fields.description: Thin adhesive webcam cover with sliding shutter. Physically blocks laptop/monitor webcam. Pack of 3.

fields.name: RF Signal Detector
fields.description: Handheld detector for hidden RF transmitters, wireless cameras, and GPS trackers. Detects 1MHz–8GHz range. Counter-surveillance essential.

fields.name: Hidden Camera Detector
fields.description: Dual-mode detector using RF scanning and optical lens detection to find covert cameras in hotel rooms, Airbnbs, and offices.

fields.name: Anti Spy Detector
fields.description: Comprehensive counter-surveillance device detecting RF bugs, GSM trackers, and hidden cameras. LCD signal strength display.

fields.name: Secure Charging Cable
fields.description: USB charge-only cable with data lines physically removed. Safe for public charging. Available in USB-A to Lightning, USB-C, and Micro-USB.

fields.name: USB Power Monitor
fields.description: Inline USB meter displaying voltage, current, power, and capacity. Detects anomalies in USB charging that may indicate malicious hardware.

fields.name: Portable Secure Power Bank
fields.description: 20,000mAh power bank with hardware data-blocking on all USB-A ports. Charges only, never syncs. Ideal for field operations.

fields.name: ACR122U NFC Reader
fields.description: USB NFC reader/writer supporting ISO 14443 A/B and FeliCa. Compatible with libnfc and popular NFC tools. Standard for NFC research and card analysis.

fields.name: RFID Cloner Kit
fields.description: 125kHz RFID read/write kit for EM4100 and HID cards. Includes handheld reader, blank cards, and key fobs. Used for access control security assessments.

fields.name: RTL-SDR Dongle
fields.description: Wideband software-defined radio receiver (500kHz–1.75GHz). Receive-only. Perfect for learning radio protocols, ADS-B aircraft tracking, and spectrum analysis.

fields.name: LoRa Dev Board
fields.description: Long-range low-power IoT development board with LoRa transceiver. Ideal for building LoRaWAN sensors, tracking devices, and learning LPWAN protocols.

fields.name: ESP8266 NodeMCU
fields.description: Low-cost WiFi microcontroller with full TCP/IP stack. Programmable via Arduino IDE. Used for IoT projects, WiFi deauthers, and network tools.

fields.name: ESP32 Dev Kit
fields.description: Dual-core WiFi + Bluetooth microcontroller. More powerful than ESP8266. Supports BLE sniffing, WiFi scanning, and custom sensor projects.

fields.name: Flipper Zero
fields.description: The ultimate portable multi-tool for security researchers. Reads/emulates RFID, NFC, IR, Sub-GHz signals, iButton, and has BadUSB capabilities. Huge community and plugin ecosystem.

fields.name: Pwnagotchi Kit
fields.description: Custom-assembled Pwnagotchi unit based on Raspberry Pi Zero W. AI-driven WPA handshake capture tool with e-ink display. Assembled and pre-configured locally by VinekTech.

fields.name: Raspberry Pi 4 (4GB)
fields.description: Quad-core 64-bit SBC with 4GB RAM. The go-to platform for custom pentest tools, Pi-hole, network monitoring, and portable hacking setups.

fields.name: Raspberry Pi 5 (8GB)
fields.description: Latest generation SBC with PCIe support, significantly faster than Pi 4. Ideal for heavy pentesting workloads and AI-assisted security tools.

fields.name: Raspberry Pi Zero W
fields.description: Ultra-compact WiFi-enabled SBC. Used in Pwnagotchi builds, covert pentest implants, and portable network tools.

fields.name: BeagleBone Black
fields.description: ARM Cortex-A8 SBC with PRU real-time coprocessors. Excellent for industrial IoT security testing and hardware interfacing projects.

fields.name: Intel NUC Mini PC
fields.description: Compact x86 mini PC running full Linux distributions. Perfect for portable Kali Linux or Parrot OS pentesting setups and on-site lab deployments.

fields.name: Proxmark3 RDV4
fields.description: Professional RFID research platform supporting LF and HF cards (125kHz–13.56MHz). Emulate, clone, sniff, and brute-force access control cards. The gold standard for RFID security research.

fields.name: Chameleon Ultra
fields.description: Next-gen RFID/NFC emulator supporting a wide range of card types including MIFARE, iCLASS, and EM4100. Bluetooth-enabled with mobile app support.

fields.name: HackRF One
fields.description: Open-source SDR peripheral covering 1MHz–6GHz with TX and RX capability. Transmit and receive any radio signal. Essential for RF security research.

fields.name: Ubertooth One
fields.description: Open-source Bluetooth sniffing platform. Captures Bluetooth Classic and BLE traffic for protocol analysis and security research.

fields.name: Yard Stick One
fields.description: Sub-GHz RF transceiver (300–348MHz, 391–464MHz, 782–928MHz). Transmit and receive on ISM bands. Used for garage door, car key fob, and IoT RF research.

fields.name: Bluetooth Sniffer
fields.description: Passive BLE packet sniffer for protocol analysis. Captures advertising packets and connection data for IoT device security assessments.

fields.name: Zigbee Sniffer
fields.description: USB Zigbee packet capture device for smart home and IoT protocol analysis. Compatible with Wireshark via the whsniff plugin.

fields.name: Drone Signal Analyzer
fields.description: Passive RF analyzer for detecting and identifying drone control signals. Supports 2.4GHz and 5.8GHz bands. For authorized spectrum monitoring.

fields.name: WiFi Pineapple
fields.description: Professional WiFi auditing platform by Hak5. Performs rogue AP, MITM, and reconnaissance attacks in authorized network assessments. Used by red teams worldwide.

fields.name: LAN Turtle
fields.description: Covert network implant in a USB Ethernet adapter form factor. Provides persistent remote access and network reconnaissance capabilities for authorized red team ops.

fields.name: Packet Squirrel
fields.description: Inline Ethernet hardware tap with OpenWRT. Enables passive packet capture, DNS spoofing, and VPN tunneling for authorized network audits.

fields.name: Shark Jack
fields.description: Portable network attack and reconnaissance tool. Executes payloads on any Ethernet port and exfiltrates network intel. For authorized on-site assessments.

fields.name: Plunder Bug
fields.description: Passive inline Ethernet tap for packet capture. Connects between any network device and switch. No power required. For authorized network monitoring.

fields.name: Network Tap Hardware
fields.description: Passive copper network tap for full-duplex 10/100/1000 Ethernet monitoring. No configuration required. Feeds packet capture tools silently.

fields.name: Network Packet Analyzer Device
fields.description: Dedicated hardware network analyzer with built-in storage. Captures and replays full packet data on 1Gbps links. For authorized network forensics.

fields.name: YubiKey 5 NFC
fields.description: Hardware security key supporting FIDO2, WebAuthn, TOTP, PGP, and PIV. NFC-enabled for mobile use. The industry standard for phishing-resistant MFA.

fields.name: SoloKey Security Key
fields.description: Open-source FIDO2/U2F hardware security key. Auditable firmware, USB-A and USB-C variants. Affordable alternative to YubiKey for FIDO2 authentication.

fields.name: Nitrokey Pro 2
fields.description: Open-source hardware security key with on-device OpenPGP, S/MIME, and one-time password support. For email encryption and secure authentication.

fields.name: Nitrokey Storage 2
fields.description: Encrypted USB drive with integrated OpenPGP smartcard. 64GB AES-256 encrypted storage plus hardware-backed key management.

fields.name: Kit: Bug Bounty Starter
fields.description: Curated starter kit for bug bounty hunters: WiFi adapter (Alfa AWUS036ACH) + RTL-SDR + Proxmark3 + USB Rubber Ducky + encrypted USB drive. Discounted bundle.

fields.name: Kit: Red Team Physical
fields.description: Complete physical red team kit: Flipper Zero + Bash Bunny + LAN Turtle + Proxmark3 RDV4 + Lock Pick Set + Faraday bag. For authorized physical penetration testing.

fields.name: Kit: Full SDR Lab
fields.description: Complete RF research kit: HackRF One + Ubertooth One + Yard Stick One + RTL-SDR + Drone Signal Analyzer. Full spectrum coverage from Sub-GHz to 6GHz.

fields.name: Kit: IoT Security Testing
fields.description: IoT pentest kit: ESP32 + ESP8266 + Zigbee Sniffer + Bluetooth Sniffer + RTL-SDR + LoRa board + Smart Home pentest guide. For authorized IoT device assessments.

fields.name: GL.iNet Travel Router
fields.description: Pocket-sized OpenWRT router with VPN client support (WireGuard/OpenVPN). Used for secure travel networking, rogue AP detection, and on-site network pivoting.

fields.name: OpenWRT Router
fields.description: Pre-flashed OpenWRT router for advanced network security labs. Supports VLANs, IDS/IPS plugins, and traffic analysis. Ideal for home lab and corporate training.

fields.name: Hardware Firewall Appliance
fields.description: Dedicated x86 hardware firewall appliance running pfSense or OPNsense. Multi-port Gigabit, VPN gateway, IDS/IPS capable. For SMB and enterprise deployments.

fields.name: Portable VPN Router
fields.description: Battery-powered travel router with built-in WireGuard VPN support. Creates a secure encrypted WiFi hotspot from any wired or wireless connection.

fields.name: Secure KVM Switch
fields.description: Hardware-enforced KVM switch with optical data diodes between ports. Prevents cross-contamination between high and low security systems.

fields.name: Logic Analyzer USB
fields.description: 8/16-channel USB logic analyzer compatible with Sigrok/PulseView. Decodes SPI, I2C, UART, 1-Wire, and more. Essential for firmware and hardware security research.

fields.name: JTAG Debugger
fields.description: USB JTAG/SWD debugger for embedded systems. Supports ARM Cortex, MIPS, and RISC-V targets. Used for firmware extraction and hardware security analysis.

fields.name: EEPROM Programmer
fields.description: Universal EEPROM/Flash programmer supporting thousands of chips. Read, write, and erase firmware from routers, IoT devices, and embedded systems.

fields.name: BIOS Flash Programmer CH341A
fields.description: CH341A-based 24/25 series EEPROM and SPI flash programmer. Read and write BIOS chips, extract firmware from embedded devices.

fields.name: USB Protocol Analyzer
fields.description: Hardware USB 2.0 protocol analyzer capturing full-speed and low-speed transactions. Essential for reverse engineering USB devices and HID malware analysis.

fields.name: NVIDIA Jetson Nano
fields.description: AI edge computing module with 128-core Maxwell GPU and 4GB RAM. Run AI-powered security tools, computer vision, and neural network inference at the edge.

fields.name: USB Armory Mk II
fields.description: Open-source USB computer for security applications. ARM Cortex-A7, 512MB RAM, USB-C. Used as a hardware security module, password manager, or covert security implant in authorized audits.

fields.name: SCADA Test Device
fields.description: Portable device for testing industrial control system protocols (Modbus, DNP3, IEC 61850). For authorized ICS/SCADA security assessments.

fields.name: IoT Security Testing Kit
fields.description: Comprehensive kit for IoT device security assessments: firmware extraction tools, radio sniffers, and protocol analyzers in a portable case.

fields.name: Smart Home Pentest Kit
fields.description: Targeted kit for smart home device auditing: Zigbee sniffer + Bluetooth sniffer + ESP32 + IR blaster + universal remote. For authorized smart home security assessments.

fields.name: Thermal Camera Module
fields.description: USB thermal imaging module for hardware security research. Detect heat signatures from active components, find hidden electronics, and analyze PCB activity.

fields.name: IR Blaster + Receiver Kit
fields.description: IR transmitter and receiver combo for capturing and replaying infrared remote control signals. Used in smart home security testing and IoT device research.

fields.name: Universal Remote Hacking Device
fields.description: Capture, analyze, and replay IR and RF remote control signals. Supports 300+ protocols. For authorized smart device security testing.

fields.name: SIM Card Reader/Writer
fields.description: USB SIM card reader and writer for telecom security research. Read IMSI, ADN phonebook, and SMS data from standard SIM cards in authorized assessments.

fields.name: Lock Pick Set (professional)
fields.description: Professional stainless steel lock pick set with 24 picks, 5 tension wrenches, and carrying case. For certified locksmiths and authorized physical security assessors.

fields.name: Digital Door Lock Tester
fields.description: Electronic tool for testing digital door lock vulnerabilities including replay attacks, voltage glitching, and firmware extraction. For authorized physical pentest engagements.

fields.name: Key Decoder Tool
fields.description: Optical key decoder that photographs and decodes key bitting from a distance. Used by authorized locksmiths and physical security auditors.

fields.name: Multiport USB Data Switch
fields.description: Manual USB 3.0 switch allowing one computer to securely share peripherals with multiple machines, or to isolate USB devices during malware analysis.

fields.name: Industrial Network Sniffer
fields.description: Ruggedized hardware network capture device for industrial environments. Supports copper and fiber taps on PROFINET, EtherNet/IP, and standard Ethernet.

fields.name: Deauther Watch
fields.description: Wearable ESP8266 device that runs WiFi deauthentication attacks for authorized network testing. Wristwatch form factor with OLED display and button controls.

fields.name: DSTIKE Deauther OLED
fields.description: ESP8266-based WiFi deauther with OLED display and navigation buttons. Runs SpacehuhnTech deauther firmware. For authorized wireless network testing.

fields.name: Key Croc
fields.description: Inline keylogger and HID tool by Hak5 disguised as a keyboard pass-through. Logs keystrokes and executes payloads triggered by typed keywords. For authorized red team physical ops.

fields.name: Screen Crab
fields.description: HDMI pass-through capture implant by Hak5. Silently records screen output to microSD or exfiltrates via WiFi. For authorized physical security audits.
